description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, defines a .m2/repository cache, and sets MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables for batch mode, error handling, and local repository location. Define two stages, build and test, and a validate:jdk8 job in the build stage that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile`. Add a verify:jdk8 job in the test stage that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage` and is configured to run on all branches except master. No artifacts or services are defined, and the pipeline relies solely on the Maven commands and cache.
